title: potentilla neglecta var. dissecta
intro: Potentilla neglecta var. dissecta, also known as a shrubby cinquefoil, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the Rosaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly due to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids in its roots, stems, and leaves, which have been used to treat various health issues. The plant is known to have health benefits such as anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which can help in reducing pain, fighting infections, and protecting against cell damage. The herbal preparations of Potentilla neglecta var. dissecta include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to create teas, salves, and other medicinal products.
